headline: Verizon Fractus Settlement Clears IoT Antenna Cloud For Investors
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) has reached a settlement with Fractus that resolves patent litigation over antenna technology used in Internet of Things and fleet management applications. The agreement ends a legal dispute that had raised questions about Verizon’s use of certain IoT antenna designs and related financial exposure. The settlement removes a source of uncertainty around Verizon’s ability to keep deploying connected device and fleet management solutions that rely on this...

headline: Barclays Lifts Verizon (VZ) Price Target, Notes Resilient Telecom Positioning
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is included among the 14 Cheap DRIP Stocks to Buy Now. On March 31, Barclays raised its price recommendation on Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) to $47 from $43. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The firm said pricing across both wireless and broadband is starting to trend lower. […]
